items.scenario: You are a university student who has recently moved into a new apartment. You have noticed some issues with the apartment. You want to inform your landlord, Mr. Thompson, about these problems.
items.subject: Request for apartment repairs
bullets: Describe the issues you have encountered in the apartment.
Explain how conditions negatively affect your studies.
Request that he make arrangements to address these issues soon.

items.scenario: You recently joined a student organization at your university that focuses on environmental conservation. The group is planning an upcoming event to raise awareness about recycling and reducing waste. You have some ideas for activities and would like to share them with the group leader, Julia.
items.subject: Ideas for recycling awareness event
bullets: Describe your ideas for the awareness event.
Explain why you believe these activities will be effective.
Offer to help organize and implement the activities.

items.scenario: You and your friend, Jasmine, are planning to host a fundraising event for a local children's hospital. You have some ideas for activities and entertainment to include in the event, but you need Jasmine's input to finalize the plans. You also want to discuss the best time to meet and organize the details.
items.subject: Fundraising event planning
bullets: Describe the ideas you have for the fundraising event.
Explain why you think these activities will be successful.
Suggest a time to meet and discuss the plans in more detail.

items.scenario: Your professor, Dr. Smith, recently assigned a group project due in two weeks. You are frustrated because not all of your group members are contributing equally to the project.
items.subject: Issues with group project
bullets: Describe the issue you are facing with your group members.
Describe your specific contribution to the project.
Explain why you and the group have been unable to address this issue.

items.scenario: You are a university student living in a dormitory. Recently, you have noticed that the internet connection in your dormitory is very slow and often disconnects. This issue is making it difficult for you to complete your assignments and attend online classes. You want to report this problem to the dormitory manager, Mr. Evans, and request a solution.
items.subject: Internet connection issues in dormitory
bullets: Describe the issue with the internet connection.
Explain how this problem is affecting your studies.
Request that the internet connection be improved as soon as possible.

items.scenario: Your friend, Alex, has been feeling overwhelmed with university assignments. You have noticed that he is struggling to keep up with his workload and is not taking proper care of his health. You want to offer some helpful advice.
items.subject: Managing stress and workload
bullets: Describe to Alex what you have recently noticed about him.
Explain why it is important to maintain good health.
Suggest some specific strategies Alex can use to manage his stress and workload.

items.scenario: You recently started a job on campus. Your academic advisor, Professor Patel, has been helpful in guiding you through your studies. However, you are finding it difficult to balance your work schedule with your academic commitments.
items.subject: Request to discuss academic and work balance
bullets: Thank her for the support and guidance she has provided.
Discuss why you are having difficulty completing your academic commitments.
Explain how you plan to balance your academic commitments and work plans.

items.scenario: You are a student who recently participated in a group project for your marketing class. One of your group members, Lisa, did an excellent job on part of the project.
items.subject: Appreciation for group project contribution
bullets: Thank her for her excellent contribution to the group project.
Explain what part of Lisa's contribution you appreciated most and how her efforts helped the team succeed.
Suggest working together on future projects and ask for her opinion.

items.scenario: You recently started going to yoga classes at your university gym. You have been enjoying the sessions overall, but you have experienced some back pain and would like advice from the instructor, Ms. Martinez, on how to modify your practice to avoid further discomfort.
items.subject: Advice on yoga practice
bullets: Mention how much you enjoy the yoga classes.
Describe the back pain you are experiencing.
Ask for advice on how to modify your practice to prevent discomfort.

items.scenario: Your classmate Emma recently hosted a charity event on campus to raise funds for a local animal shelter. The event was successful overall, but there were some issues with the catering service, including delayed food delivery and incorrect orders. You need to address these concerns to the catering manager, Ms. Johnson.
items.subject: Catering service issues
bullets: Thank her for the service provided.
Describe the issues that occurred during the event.
Suggest how these issues could be resolved in future events.

items.scenario: You are a student who recently borrowed a book from the university library. Unfortunately, you accidentally damaged the book. You want to inform the librarian, Mr. Anderson, about the incident and inquire about the steps you need to take to resolve the situation.
items.subject: Damaged library book
bullets: Describe the incident that caused the book damage and the extent of the damage to the book.
Explain your concern about the consequences for damaging the book.
Ask about the steps you should take to resolve the situation.

items.scenario: You are a student who missed an important lecture in your biology class. You need to catch up on the material and want to ask a classmate, Maria, for her notes and any key information you missed. You also want to thank her in advance for her help.
items.subject: Request for Lecture Notes
bullets: Explain why you did not attend the lecture
Request her help and ask her if she has time available to help you catch up
Thank her in advance for her assistance

items.scenario: Your professor, Dr. Smith, recently assigned a group project due in two weeks. You are frustrated because not all of your group members are contributing equally to the project.
items.subject: Issues with group project
bullets: Describe the issue you are facing with your group members.
Describe your specific contribution to the project.
Explain why you and the group have been unable to address this issue.

items.scenario: You recently attended your university's choir concert and had a great experience. However, you left your favorite jacket behind. You need to contact the university's lost and found department.
items.subject: Lost Jacket Inquiry
bullets: Explain when and where you left your jacket.
Describe the jacket in detail.
Suggest a solution for the issue.

items.scenario: You recently attended a university orchestra concert. While you enjoyed the performance greatly, the sound quality at the venue was poor, making it difficult to fully appreciate the music. You would like to provide feedback to the sound engineer, Mr. Bridges, in hopes of improving future events.
items.subject: Feedback on concert sound quality
bullets: Describe what you enjoyed about the concert.
Explain the issue you had with the sound quality.
Suggest ways the venue could improve the sound experience for future concerts.

items.scenario: You recently purchased a new kitchen appliance from a store called 'Home Essentials'. After using it for a few days, you noticed some problems with it. You want to inform the customer service representative, Ms. Parker, about the issue.
items.subject: Issue with kitchen appliance purchase
bullets: Describe the issue you are experiencing with the kitchen appliance.
Explain why this issue is problematic for you.
Request a replacement or repair for the appliance.

items.scenario: You are planning a trip with your classmates to a popular tourist destination during your semester break. You need to book accommodations and ensure the hotel can meet your group's needs. You want to contact the hotel to confirm these details.
items.subject: Trip Accommodation Inquiry
bullets: Explain the purpose of your trip and the number of people in your group.
Explain your group's specific requirements.
Request the hotel send any additional information needed.

bullets: Describe the issue you are experiencing with the kitchen appliance.

bullets: Describe the event and its importance.
Ask about their services for printing promotional materials.
Inquire about the costs and turnaround time for printing.

items.subject: Suggestion for updating gym equipment
bullets: Describe the issues you have noticed with the current equipment.
Provide reasons for why adding new equipment would improve the gym experience.
Explain the consequences on membership of not improving the services.

bullets: Explain the purpose of the event.

Inquire about any additional services they offer.
